Item Name: VAHDAM, Butterfly Pea Flower Tea Bags (15 Pyramid Tea Bags) Vegan, Non-GMO | Delicate & Earthy | Direct From Source - Plant Based Biodegradable Tea Bags | Brew Iced Tea, Cooking, Mocktails & Cocktails
Bullet Point 1: Harvested in India - Butterfly Blue Pea Flower Herbal Tea is crafted from blue pea flowers sourced directly from Indian farms, with no middlemen involved, grown sustainably and free from artificial flavors.
Bullet Point 2: Floral & Aromatic Blue Pea Flower Tea - Our tea offers a delightful, floral experience with a vibrant and an aromatic earthy flavor. Being caffeine-free, it's perfect for any time of the day.
Bullet Point 3: Full-Flavor Individually-Wrapped Tea Bags - High-quality tea leaves in plant-based biodegradable tea bags, individually wrapped to preserve freshness. The pyramid shape of tea bags allows leaves to unfurl fully, releasing rich flavors for an aromatic tea experience.
Bullet Point 4: A Brand With a Billion Dreams - Feel alive with VAHDAM India’s premium teas. A leading global brand, we ship to over 3 million customers in 130+ countries. Proudly carbon-neutral and plastic-neutral, we invest in environmental sustainability under our home-grown, sustainable label.
Bullet Point 5: Ethical, Direct & Fair-trade - Our supply chain ensures you get the freshest tea while farmers receive fair prices. We reinvest 1% of our revenue into the education of our tea growers' children through our Teach Me initiative, honoring their aspirations and supporting their future.
Value: 15.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium herbal tea brand with sustainable and ethical sourcing. High-quality pyramid tea bags made from plant-based biodegradable material. Carbon-neutral and plastic-neutral certifications indicate strong environmental commitment. Positioned as a premium product with fair-trade practices and direct sourcing from Indian farms.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Snowy River Sugared Cocktail Salt Pride Blend - Naturally Colored Margarita Salt with Sugar hints, Margarita Rimmer, Beverage Rimmer, Cocktail Rimming Salt, Decorative Salt, Kosher (8oz Bag)
Bullet Point 1: Celebrate with All Natural Pride Cocktail Sugared Salt Mix - Multi Colored Rimming Salt with a touch of salty sweetness for drinks and Cocktails. All Natural Cocktail Rimming Salt – Ideal for rimming margaritas, cocktails, mocktails and other beverages. Rim your margarita glasses and cocktail glasses in style! And yes, we add a touch of sugar to bring this rimmer to a whole new taste sensation!
Bullet Point 2: This Sugared Salt combination is an old bartender trick such that the addition of sugar with the salt creates a layering of flavor in the mouth that provides a whole new taste experience for your cocktails. Snowy River rimming salt is 100% naturally colored with real fruit and veg, Kosher Certified, Vegan, GMO Free, allergen free and our cocktail rimming salt is proudly US made.
Bullet Point 3: Made with kosher salt, Snowy River’s vibrant salt colors are designed by bartenders for bartenders to cater for all your margarita salt rimming needs, simple and easy to apply, and has long shelf life. Our cocktail salt is the perfect cocktail garnish and bar accessory for your home or bar.
Bullet Point 4: To apply cocktail salt to your margarita glass - pre-wet edge of your margarita glass with simple syrup (2 to 1 sugar to water mix recommended) and then evenly roll the margarita glass edge into the cocktail rimming salt. Works great with other cocktail glassware as well.
Bullet Point 5: Snowy River salt rimmer for cocktails and margaritas is available as a standalone salt rimmer pack or combine with our edible cocktail glitter to match the glass rimmer to the color of the drink itself. Snowy River offers a broad range of all natural cocktail garnishes and glass rimmers for drinks.
Product Description: All Natural Pride Kosher Salt - A Celebration! </br>Snowy River all natural Pride colored salt blend is a rich tapestry of colored salts and sugars to add the perfect taste combination to any cocktail or beverage. From the first hint of our all natural kosher salt through to the amazing fruit and veg based coloring, Snowy River salts add a fresh, natural taste and look to any margarita or cocktail. The perfect drink is not complete until finished with Snowy River all natural cocktail salt rimmers.</br>At the heart of our cocktail salt is the kosher salt itself, chosen for its flavor, texture and solubility. Importantly kosher salts are all natural and do not contain iodine thus ensuring a more delicate salt taste for cocktail and beverage application. </br>Key Features of our Pride Cocktail Salt Includes:</br> Naturally colored with real fruit and vegetables.</br> Gluten Free and GMO Free. </br>Kosher Certified. </br>No artificial colors or preservatives.</br>Our flavors and colors are vibrant and look amazing.</br>Proudly US Made.</br>To apply Snowy River cocktail salt: 1) Pour some salt onto a small plate 2) rim the glass with lemon or lime (egg white will provide a thicker rim) 3) roll the glass into the cocktail salt and twist slowly to ensure even application 4) Add your favorite cocktail. </br>Snowy River cocktail salts and cocktail sugar rimmers are used in professional bars and pubs, but are also great for the home or anytime you need to add some real spark to your glass! And if you need to add more color or sparkle to the drink itself, Snowy River has a huge range of all natural cocktail glitters and beverage colorings. </br>Color your cocktail world with Snowy River Cocktails!
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
product_name: Snowy River Sugared Cocktail Salt Pride Blend - Naturally Colored Margarita Salt with Sugar hints
overall_summary: All-natural, kosher-certified cocktail salt blend with vibrant fruit and vegetable-based colors, positioned as a premium bar accessory for margaritas and cocktails. Mid-range pricing likely due to natural ingredients, kosher certification, and US-made quality. Packaging and branding suggest a niche market appeal rather than mass-market affordability.

Item Name: Torani Real Fruit Smoothie Mix, Lemonade, 64 Ounce

Bullet Point 2: Designed with convenience in mind, our smoothie mixes are made with real fruit flavor and have no artificial flavors or preservatives; Just pour over ice, juice, or yogurt, then blend and serve
